Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $293,108,509Details
International Box Office $644,335,726
Worldwide Box Office $937,444,235
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $231,505,209
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,303,145
Total $236,808,354
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Now in his fifth year at Hogwarts, Harry learns that many in the wizarding community do not know the truth of his encounter with Lord Voldemort. Cornelius Fudge, minister of Magic, appoints his toady, Dolores Umbridge, as Defense Against the Dark Arts teacher, for he fears that professor Dumbledore will take his job. But her teaching is deficient and her methods, cruel, so Harry prepares a group of students to defend the school against a rising tide of evil.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$77,108,414 (26.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.80 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,285 opening theaters/4,285 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $508,132,273

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 11th, 2007 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
July 11th, 2007 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
September 2nd, 2018 (Limited), released as Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix (2007) (Re-Release)
International Releases: July 11th, 2007 (Wide) (Australia)
July 11th, 2007 (Wide) (New Zealand)
July 11th, 2007 (Wide), released as Harry Potter en de orde van de Feniks (Netherlands)
July 12th, 2007 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
July 12th, 2007 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: December 11th, 2007 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of fantasy violence and frightening images
Running Time: 138 minutes
Franchise: Harry Potter
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Good vs. Evil
Social setting: Boarding School
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Heyday Films
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English

Synopsis

Now in his fifth year at Hogwarts, Harry learns that many in the wizarding community do not know the truth of his encounter with Lord Voldemort. Cornelius Fudge, minister of Magic, appoints his toady, Dolores Umbridge, as Defense Against the Dark Arts teacher, for he fears that professor Dumbledore will take his job. But her teaching is deficient and her methods, cruel, so Harry prepares a group of students to defend the school against a rising tide of evil.
